scripts.clean:generated: npm run clean --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/shared && npm run clean --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/server && npm run clean --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/client
scripts.build:workspaces: npm run build --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/shared && npm run build --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/server && npm run build --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/client
scripts.typecheck:workspaces: npm run typecheck --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @webgpu-metaverse/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:workspaces && npm run typecheck:contracts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:runtime
